## Problem

What workflow or limitation are you trying to improve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the impact on local Bonsai usage.

## Extra Context

Mockups, references, Prism/Bonsai notes, or technical constraints.
